channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-16
item.description:
It's been an exciting week in the open-source research community, with multiple projects making significant progress. The `scienceverse/metacheck` and `MicheleNuijten/statcheck` projects have both seen updates, with `metacheck` adding the ability to process JASP files and improving study categorization, while `statcheck` received admin updates on its `feature-non-apa-newer` branch. Meanwhile, the `quest-bih/oddpub` project has been refining its ontogenerator, with updates to documentation and reference detection. Other notable updates include fixes and improvements to `giladfeldman/docpluck`, `Davidvandijcke/coarse`, `JamieCummins/regcheck`, and `giladfeldman/escicheck`, demonstrating the community's commitment to ongoing development and refinement. The addition of a Chrome Webstore link for `giovannacdelsordo/output-it-forward` also highlights the growing accessibility of these tools. These connections and advancements showcase the collaborative spirit and dedication to advancing open-source research tools.

29 commits across 3 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck, oddpub

Most active:

regcheck22 commits
oddpub4 commits
metacheck3 commits

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where a merge was performed from the same branch of the repository, as indicated by the commit message "Merge branch 'feature-non-apa-newer' of https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck into feature-non-apa-newer". The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch also received "admin updates", according to the commit message. No other branches were mentioned in the provided commit messages. The changes were limited to the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch, with no other branches or modules mentioned. The specific nature of the "admin updates" was not detailed in the commit message.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: oddpub: 1 commit today
item.description:
quest-bih/oddpub

The `main` branch was the focus of recent work, with two specific changes made to the ontogenerator. On July 16, the ontogenerator received a "documentation update", which suggests that changes were made to the documentation to better reflect its functionality or usage. The day prior, on July 15, the ontogenerator was modified to "improved reuse and upon request, references detection", indicating that its ability to reuse and detect references was enhanced. The ontogenerator changes were the only areas of work, with no other modules or features modified during this time. The work on the `main` branch appears to be focused on refining the ontogenerator's capabilities and documentation.

1 commit(s) today:

  • febed59 [main] documentation update — ontogenerator

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →
